_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in developing solutions and/or recommendations to minimize negative impacts of machine learning, especially for edge cases.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including defining the prediction target, identifying appropriate inputs, and establishing measurable success criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.553), AI-S-017 (AI, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.589). Shared vocabulary: [learning, machine, skill]. DCWF-only terms [cases, developing, edge, especially, impacts, minimize] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, business, criteria, defining, establishing, formulating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.886, R=0.884). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Skill in developing solutions and/or recommendations to minimize negative impact" and "Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including d" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 ≈ STS 0.589 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [learning, machine, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.7%. Shared tokens: [learning, machine, skill]. DCWF-only: [cases, developing, edge, especially, impacts, minimize]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, business, criteria, defining, establishing, formulating].
